page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.12xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates strong performance profiles across multiple compute and memory metrics. The instance achieves top-25% results in stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests, alongside strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark CPU scores. Cryptographic capabilities are supported by hardware-accelerated instruction sets such as AES, VAES, and SHA_NI, which contribute to its strong performance in PassMark encryption benchmarks. Memory performance is highlighted by a top-10% PassMark memory score and strong cached read bandwidth, though uncached large-block read and write operations fall within the average range.

From a resource-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent execution without resource contention, making it a reliable option for workloads requiring predictable performance. However, the absence of local NVMe storage represents a tradeoff, as all disk I/O must traverse the network. This configuration is suitable for database operations, static web serving, Redis caching, and multi-threaded data processing tasks that benefit from a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 48 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz and 192.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the KVM hypervisor, this server provides a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks place the instance in the top 25% for multi-core processing, static web serving, and database operations, with memory performance reaching the top 10% in PassMark testing. Uncached memory bandwidth and single-threaded compression perform at average levels. Lacking local storage, the instance relies on its 16 Gbps network bandwidth for external storage volumes. It is suited for enterprise web serving, Redis deployments, and database workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 48 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database benchmark performance.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC platform delivering balanced compute and memory resources with strong multi-core performance for enterprise workloads.

Strong top-25% multi-core and database benchmark performance
Top-10% PassMark memory score with 16 Gbps network bandwidth
Hardware-accelerated cryptography via AES, VAES, and SHA_NI
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for database operations, Redis, and static web serving
